name: lab
description: /lab вҖ” research-lab control-tower (domain-agnostic) with a code-level decision harness (0.7.0) + all-paths autonomy (0.8.0). One persistent mission-control over EVERY in-flight job of a long-running campaign across ANY execution surface (rented pods via cloud В· pool hosts В· local procs). Ties the manifest (cwd ./pods.json) + event-driven watchers + harvest+verdict + the autonomous harvestвҶ’re-dispatch loop into one command. NOT domain-locked вҖ” DFT sweeps В· ML training fleets В· build matrices В· render farms В· any N-parallel-job campaign with a queued backlog. Verbs: bare/status В· progress (1.1.0 read-only research-ARC bar) В· tick [--apply] (0.7.0 deterministic probeвҶ’classifyвҶ’decide harness via bin/system_harness.hexa) В· watch В· harvest [<id>] В· next/redispatch В· auto В· drive В· pursue (0.8.0 вҖ” ALL-PATHS autonomy: enumerate EVERY open campaign thread (stalled-resumable jobs В· tooling gaps В· queued waves В· cost-leaks В· un-harvested terminals) + fan ALL out in parallel вүӨ2-3 agents, NO human 'which next?' menu; only genuine human-input gates wait) В· mirror [<seed>] (1.2.0 кұ°мҡёл°© вҖ” DELEGATE to the mirror-loop skill, d4 reuse) В· stop В· cost В· queue [add|rm|ls] В· upstream [<repo>]. 1.2.0 ADDS `lab mirror` (the mirror room вҖ” pure delegation to the mirror-loop skill's miningвҶ’kickвҶ’atlas self-evolution ouroboros, NO reimplementation) + documents a planned lab-lifecycle subcommand set (notebook = append-only journal/decision log В· bench = micro-experiment sweep wrapping /micro-exp В· review = verdict-matrix audit) as stubs. 1.1.0 ADDED `lab progress` вҖ” a read-only campaign-ARC 10-cell bar aggregating verdicts-closed (exports/*/ledger.json + .verdicts/), papers-shipped (PAPER.tape), atlas atom-growth (hexa atlas stats), domain milestones (DOMAINS.tape); each source degrades gracefully (absent вҶ’ dropped from the mean, not 0%). DISTINCT from `status` (per-job operational live dashboard) вҖ” `progress` is the epistemic research-program arc. 1.0.0 RENAMED the skill `system вҶ’ lab` (research-lab metaphor); the `/system` invocation + every prior trigger (кҙҖм ңнғ‘ В· mission control В· control tower В· campaign status) stay live as DEPRECATED aliases вҖ” lossless, so existing muscle memory never breaks. All prior verbs preserved verbatim; bin/system_harness.hexa unchanged. Abstract job model. Reuses ./pods.json (cloud dispatch SSOT). Triggers: /lab В· лһ© В· м—°кө¬мӢӨ В· research lab В· lab progress В· м—°кө¬ м§„мІҷлҸ„ В· lab mirror В· кұ°мҡёл°© В· /system (deprecated) В· кҙҖм ңнғ‘ (deprecated) В· мә нҺҳмқё нҳ„нҷ© В· mission control (deprecated) В· campaign status (deprecated) В· нӣ„ліҙ мһҗмңЁ В· лӘЁл“  кІҪлЎң м§„н–ү В· pursue В· tick В· кІ°кіјліҙкі  м¶”к°Җл°ңмӮ¬ В· мһҗмңЁ мһ¬л°ңмӮ¬ лЈЁн”„ В· control tower (deprecated).
